creator: olivierd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 165634
Patch to update graphics/poppler and slaves ports

- Update to 0.40.0

Complete logs can be found here:

* FreeBSD 10.2 amd64:

http://81.7.17.160/logs/poppler/10.2/poppler-0.40.0.log
http://81.7.17.160/logs/poppler/10.2/poppler-glib-0.40.0.log
http://81.7.17.160/logs/poppler/10.2/poppler-qt4-0.40.0.log
http://81.7.17.160/logs/poppler/10.2/poppler-qt5-0.40.0.log
http://81.7.17.160/logs/poppler/10.2/poppler-utils-0.40.0.log

* FreeBSD 9.3 amd64:

http://81.7.17.160/logs/poppler/9.3/poppler-0.40.0.log
http://81.7.17.160/logs/poppler/9.3/poppler-glib-0.40.0.log
http://81.7.17.160/logs/poppler/9.3/poppler-qt4-0.40.0.log
http://81.7.17.160/logs/poppler/9.3/poppler-qt5-0.40.0.log
http://81.7.17.160/logs/poppler/9.3/poppler-utils-0.40.0.log

Note: Inkscape was tested (only on FreeBSD 10.2 amd64) with poppler 0.40.0, and build succeed.
